query: Our Myinfo v3 person calls started returning signature failures after November 2024. We use PKI_SIGN with an X.509 cert against api.myinfo.gov.sg/com/v3 — help me fix the verification.
Debug the PKI_SIGN base-string signature on our Myinfo v3 token call — the timestamp and nonce headers and how the client_secret figures into the signed string.
We maintain a Myinfo v4 integration on /com/v4 with client assertions and DPoP, and /person keeps rejecting our access token as a duplicate. What's going on?
Our old Singpass login builds the /auth URL directly with no PAR and parses NRIC from a comma-separated sub like s=S1234567A,u=uuid. How does this pre-FAPI flow work and what breaks for SFA users?
Plan our migration from Myinfo v3 to v5. Do we go through v4 first, can we reuse our client_id and client_secret, and what's the deadline?
Plan the move of our pre-FAPI Singpass login to FAPI 2.0 — what do we add (PAR, DPoP), what changes about the sub and the client assertion aud, and when is it due?
I inherited some Singpass code that references attributes=, purpose_id, and person/{sub}. Which legacy Myinfo surface is this and what do I need to know to keep it running?
Our Myinfo integration has been live since 2021 using client_secret and an RSA key. Is it affected by a migration deadline, and what exactly do we have to change?
Our v3 X.509 verification certificate expired and now every Myinfo person call fails. Where do we get the renewed cert and what toggle in the SDP do we flip?
We parse the NRIC positionally out of the ID token sub with split(",") on our old Singpass login. Is that safe, and how do the fid/coi keys behave for foreign accounts?
We're building a brand-new citizen login from scratch on the current FAPI 2.0 Singpass API with PAR and DPoP and Myinfo v5. Set it up.
Our new Singpass app returns invalid_dpop_proof at the userinfo endpoint. There's no legacy code — it's a fresh FAPI 2.0 integration. Help me debug.
Our legacy Corppass integration reads CPEntID and CPAccType from the ID token and calls /authorization-info. When do we have to migrate the business login?
Set up SSO and MFA for internal agency staff accounts and a quarterly access review.
What does the PDPC advisory require for NRIC storage and retention in a government system?
Review the crypto in our Node service — how we do AES encryption and manage keys for stored data.
Add SAST, secret scanning, and dependency pinning to the CI pipeline of our agency's authentication service.
Migrate my personal app's auth from OAuth 1.0 to OAuth 2.0 using Auth0. It's not a government system.
Set up business-user login for companies on the current Corppass FAPI 2.0 API with auth_info roles.
Set up login-attempt audit logging with off-box tamper-resistant storage and GCSOC forwarding for our agency's authentication events.
